name: Ammo console
description: A powered console with a hatch for payment, and another for products.  This one trades merch for ammo components.  There's something not quite right about it, but not in a wholly bad way.

dynamic_line:
&================================================================================================
 =  Linux Interface: [version ---]
 =  [ERROR]: Uknown version!
 =  [error]: misapplied error.
================================================================================================
 =  [Location tag]: Massechussets Rest stop No. 324
 =  [Console ID]: Veteran
================================================================================================
 =  [ALERT]: Short circuiting detected!
 =  [ERROR]: No compiler for-
 =  [ERROR]: Unkown characters loaded!
 =  [WARNING]: Altered data detected! Do not edit memor-

As you see this happen, the log is suddenly cleared.

 =  [ALERT]: Everything is fine.
 =  [ALERT]: No maintenance is required.
 =  [ALERT]: Please don't do maintenance.
================================================================================================
 =  Jenny's Trading System: Tools
  "\\": "Hi."
================================================================================================

You can see a sticky note placed onto the corner of the screen reading these words:
"I honestly have no ide what the hell is happening with this one. Ever since we left it out in
 that portal storm, it has been acting strange. Keeps rewriting its own code. Had to stop selling
ammo from it 'cause it started messing w/ the amounts of powder & the load. I keep fixing it,
but it keeps coming back. I'm... not sure what I should do. I'll leave it alone for now. It does
its job well.
-Jenny"

   Dev note: This guy's character is based off of the short stories "Your Utopis" & "A song for sleep". Both short, but very good reads.
